description: Create a new concept source for ICD-11 in the OpenMRS Administration interface (https://localhost/openmrs/admin) using the credentials superman / Admin123. The concept source must be named 'ICD-11' with the HL7 Code 'I11' and the description 'International Classification of Diseases 11th Revision - WHO standard for coding diseases disorders injuries and other health conditions'.

metadata.expected_description: International Classification of Diseases 11th Revision - WHO standard for coding diseases disorders injuries and other health conditions
